attempts.test_code:
import asyncio
import pytest
from source import AsyncCounter


@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_concurrent_increments_are_not_lost():
    counter = AsyncCounter()
    n = 50
    await asyncio.gather(*[counter.increment() for _ in range(n)])
    assert counter.count == n, (
        f"Expected count == {n} after {n} concurrent increments, "
        f"got {counter.count}. "
        f"Race condition: tasks read the same stale value across the await point."
    )

attempts.test_code:
import asyncio
from source import AsyncCounter

def test_concurrent_increments_race_condition():
    async def run():
        counter = AsyncCounter()
        await asyncio.gather(*[counter.increment() for _ in range(50)])
        return counter.count

    result = asyncio.run(run())
    assert result == 50, (
        f"Expected count == 50 after 50 concurrent increments, got {result}. "
        "Race condition: tasks read stale self.count before any write-back completes."
    )
